reviews.comment:
La empleada del autoservicio sumamente desagradable y maleducada. Se le cayeron las empanadas a ella, y encima nos trato mal

(Translated by Google)
The drive-thru employee was extremely unpleasant and rude. She dropped the empanadas, and on top of that, she treated us badly.

reviews.comment:
Sin opciones vegetarianas. Poco stock de comidas. Los enchufes no funcionan. Poco lugar para sentarse - cinco mesas. Baños mal cuidados. Lástima que por fuera se ve lindo.

(Translated by Google)
No vegetarian options. Limited food stock. Electrical outlets don't work. Limited seating—five tables. Poorly maintained bathrooms. Too bad, it looks nice from the outside.

reviews.comment:
El lugar para comer es full pero no es de los más amplios, y había una sóla empleada para cobrar, y para la comida, y para todo que hacía lo mejor que podía, pero faltaba personal.

(Translated by Google)
The place to eat is full but not one of the largest, and there was only one employee to take payments, and for the food, and for everything else, who did the best she could, but there was a lack of staff.
